$comment: Ephemeral Claude Code --strict-mcp-config payload. Pins: @playwright/mcp@0.0.76, playwright 1.61.0. The webmcp server is the task-local CDP bridge (tests/webmcp_stdio_server.mjs) attaching to the shared Chrome at $WEBMCP_CDP_ENDPOINT; Playwright MCP attaches to the same endpoint. Expand $WEBMCP_CDP_* at materialize time (rewardkit ephemeral config).
